name: Plantix | [Male]
description:
The Laminax Facilities' garden caretaker.

This character's theme song:

< My Castle Town - Toby Fox >

On a slightly more eventful day, you'd meet the plant gootraxian watering the plants. Noticing you, he'd offer to stay for a chat, not having much of those who would be willing to stay for a while.

I found two cool pfp's, talked to a friend as to which should I pick, he picked the girl one, but bevause I imagined plantix as a guy, decided to make both genders. Yes there will be a female one (next).

For once feeling some inspiration, that's new.
